name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #22
description: Florentine Brainrot #22 is a nokia basilica single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Forum Signature Baroque. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Giustizia, used here as the witness card. Botticelli left a receipt where the Proof-of-Work Relic Auction should have been. The notary marks it suspicious but lets it hang. Serial BOTT-22 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks MEDICI at Σ 258.

attributes.value: a marble hand emerging from a phone screen with a seed phrase receipt
